SEARCH

Package controller

package controller
  • Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    DungeonController
    Utility class that provides helper methods for accessing dungeon-related data.
    EncounterSystem
    Utility class that manages random encounters and turn-based battles.
    EnemiesLoader
    Utility class responsible for loading enemy data from a serialized file.
    EnemyController
    Utility class that provides helper methods for accessing enemy-related data used by the application.
    GameController
    Utility controller class responsible for creating, loading, and managing Game instances.
    ItemController
    Utility controller class that provides static methods for accessing information about Item objects.
    ItemsLoader
    Utility class responsible for loading item data from a serialized file.
    PlayerController
    Utility controller class that provides static methods for creating and managing Player objects.
    SavedataHandler
    Utility class for saving and loading player save data.
